description:
Dog breath stinks… but brushing your dog’s teeth is even worse. 😅
Tien’s solution? One capful of TropiClean in Bubba’s water bowl and done. 🐾💧 Fresh breath, cleaner teeth, and zero wrestling matches.

Our Paw Picks aren’t sponsored—just real favorites from our team & community.  👉 Get yours here: https://www.thepetcollective.com/pawpicks/

#Dogs #DogCare #PetProducts #DogParents #FreshBreath #PetHacks

We're the happy place for animal lovers!  You’ll always find real pets, real joy and real mome
title: Paw Picks:  Tropiclean Fresh Breath Water Additive
